category_sources: Official homepage describes International Ispell as an interactive spell-checking program for Unix.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading uses International Ispell.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes an index, distribution notes, and documentation section.
Official homepage links to the primary manual page as the online documentation.
repo_sources: Official homepage provides a source tarball download and documentation but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes Unix spell checking, language support, dictionaries, and command-line mode.
source_facts.executables include ispell and dictionary/affix helper tools.
